ranked_movies.title: About Time
ranked_movies.reason: Explicitly mentioned as a catalyst for a major emotional breakdown in a highly upvoted post. The movie's themes of time, family, and loss deeply resonated with the OP, making it a central point of discussion.

ranked_movies.title: I Saw the Devil
ranked_movies.reason: Directly cited as the OP's 'favorite example' of a movie that gets progressively more depressing and messed up. It is the central subject of the post asking for similar films.

ranked_movies.title: Requiem for a Dream
ranked_movies.reason: The top-voted answer in the thread asking for movies that get progressively more depressing. Multiple users affirm it's a classic, impactful, but difficult-to-watch film in this genre.

ranked_movies.title: Grave of the Fireflies
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended and discussed as one of the most depressing films ever. Users mention its devastating impact and its original double-feature release with 'My Neighbor Totoro'.

ranked_movies.title: Oldboy
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned alongside other Korean films like 'I Saw the Devil' as a prime example of a dark, depressing, and messed-up story. It's a staple in these types of discussions.

ranked_movies.title: Come and See
ranked_movies.reason: Specifically highlighted with its release year (1985) as a quintessential and harrowing war film that fits the request for progressively depressing stories.

ranked_movies.title: The Road
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its bleak, post-apocalyptic atmosphere and ambiguous but likely depressing ending. It's presented as a film with a consistent downward trajectory.

ranked_movies.title: Parasite
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a recommended movie that gets progressively more messed up. Its themes of class struggle and shocking twists make it a modern example in this category.

ranked_movies.title: Manchester by the Sea
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned with an emphatic 'Oof' due to its portrayal of profound grief and depression. It's recognized for being a heavy, emotionally draining watch.

ranked_movies.title: Leaving Las Vegas
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a film that fits the pattern of a story spiraling into depression and despair, centering on themes of alcoholism and self-destruction.

ranked_movies.title: Eden Lake
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a particularly brutal and depressing horror/thriller film that becomes increasingly messed up and hopeless as it progresses.

ranked_movies.title: Children of Men
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a dystopian film with a depressing and gritty atmosphere. Its portrayal of a hopeless future makes it a common recommendation in these threads.

ranked_movies.title: Thirteen
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a film that becomes increasingly messed up, with the impact heightened by remembering the young ages of the protagonists.

ranked_movies.title: Dancer in the Dark
ranked_movies.reason: Listed alongside Parasite as a movie known for its incredibly bleak and heartbreaking storyline, typical of director Lars von Trier's work.

ranked_movies.title: Wall Street
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed in a historical context where its anti-capitalist message was subverted; audiences admired the lavish lifestyle it depicted, leading to its unintended popularity in post-Soviet Russia.

ranked_movies.title: Groundhog Day
ranked_movies.reason: The solved answer to a 'Bad Movie Description' post asking for a 'depressing movie about adulthood' where a man relives the same day. Its themes are recontextualized as depressing.

ranked_movies.title: Interstellar
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended by a user as a film they watch when depressed for its epic visuals and iconic music, which provide a powerful and distracting experience.

ranked_movies.title: Zoolander
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a user's long-time go-to comedy for distraction during depression, valued for its silliness and ability to induce laughter.

ranked_movies.title: Deadpool
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a fun, silly movie to watch with popcorn and chocolate to lift one's spirits, highlighting its effectiveness as a distraction from negative feelings.

ranked_movies.title: Amelie
ranked_movies.reason: Featured on a list of comforting films to watch when depressed. Its whimsical, charming, and uplifting nature makes it a popular choice for improving mood.
